name: claude-codex-bridge
description: Delegate consult and review to headless Claude Code, and manage trackable Claude work/resume jobs.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate work from Codex to Claude Code
interface.longDescription: Use Claude Codex Bridge to forward read-only questions and reviews to headless Claude Code, and to manage write-capable Claude jobs with explicit status, result, cancel, and resume controls.
defaultPrompt: /claude-consult ask Claude Code a read-only question
/claude-review ask Claude Code to review local changes
/claude-adversarial-review ask Claude Code to challenge local changes
/claude-verify-review verify a Claude review result locally
/claude-work delegate trackable work to Claude Code
/claude-resume resume a previous Claude Code bridge session
